name: io.github.kaitoInfra/twitterapi-io-mcp-server
description: Official MCP server for twitterapi.io — Twitter/X data (tweets, users, followers, trends). Available as both stdio npm package and hosted HTTP URL.

environmentVariables.name: TWITTERAPI_IO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your twitterapi.io API key — get from https://twitterapi.io dashboard
